snippet.title: Perseverance RoverвҖҷs Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: Rashed Al Majed ... Hask Wejudi - 2021 | ШұШ§ШҙШҜ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш§Ш¬ШҜ ... ШӯШіЩғ ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜЩҠ
snippet.description:
ЩғЩ„Щ…Ш§ШӘ: ШЈЩҶЩҲШұ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙЩҠШұЩҠ
ШЈЩ„ШӯШ§ЩҶ ЩҲШҘШҙШұШ§ЩҒ ЩҲШӘЩҶЩҒЩҠШ°: ЩҒЩҮШҜ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§ШөШұ 
ШӘЩҲШІЩҠШ№: Щ…ШӯЩ…ШҜ ЩҮЩ…Щ‘Ш§Щ…
Щ…ЩғШіШ§Ш¬: Щ…. Ш¬Ш§ШіЩ… Щ…ШӯЩ…ШҜ
 
ЩҲШӘШұЩҠШ§ШӘ: ШЈШӯЩ…ШҜ ЩҒШұШӯШ§ШӘ
Ш¬ЩҠШӘШ§Шұ: ШЈЩ…ЩҠЩҶ ЩҒШ§ЩғШ§ЩҮШ§ЩҶЩҠ
ШҘЩҠЩӮШ§Ш№Ш§ШӘ: ШіЩ…ЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ·Ш§ЩҶ
ЩғЩҲШұШ§Щ„: FN ШЈШәШ§ЩҶЩҠ(Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲЩҠШӘ)
 
Щ…ЩҮЩҶШҜШі ШөЩҲШӘ: Щ…ШӯЩ…ШҜ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ„ЩҠ
Щ…ШӘШ§ШЁШ№Ш© ЩҲШӘЩҶШіЩҠЩӮ: Ш§Щ„ШӯШіЩҠЩҶ ШҜЩҲШ®ЩҠ
ШҙЩғШұ Ш®Ш§Шө: ШӯШіЩҶ Ш·Ш§Щ„ШЁ


ШҘШҙШӘШұЩғ Ш№Щ„ЩҠ ЩӮЩҶШ§Ш© ШұЩҲШӘШ§ЩҶШ§ | Subscribe To Rotana Channel https://bit.ly/2NjviPh

ЩғЩ„Щ…Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈШәЩҶЩҠШ©

ШӯЩҗШіЩ‘Щғ ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜЩҠ ЩҲШҘЩҶШӘЩҠ ШЁШ§Щ„ШҜЩҶЩҠШ§ Ш№ЩҶШҜЩҠ
ЩҲШҘЩҶШӘЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ ЩӮЩ„ШЁЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲЩ„Щү ЩҲШҘЩҶШӘЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ®ЩҠШұШ©
ЩҲЩҮШ§Щ„ШӯШЁ Щ„ЩҲ ЩҠЩҶЩҖШҙШ§ЩҒ ЩҲШўШЁЩҖЩҲШӯ ШіЩҺЩҖШҜЩ‘ЩҠ
ШҙЩҒШӘЩҠ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҘШӯШіШ§Ші Щ…Ш§ ЩҠЩғЩҒЩҠ ШҜЩҠШұШ©
 
ЩҲЩ’ЩҠШ§ Ш№Ш§ЩҠЩҖШҙЩҖШ© ШЁЩӮЩ„ШЁЩҠ ШЈЩҶЩҖШ§ Ш§Щ„ЩҖЩҲШҜ ЩҲШҜЩ‘ЩҠ
ШұЩҲШӯЩҠ ШЈЩӮЩҖШҜЩ‘Щ…ЩҮЩҖШ§ Щ„ЩҖШ№ЩҠЩҖЩҶЩҖЩғ ШЈШіЩҖЩҠЩҖШұШ©
ЩҲШҘЩҶ ШұШ§ШӯШӘ Щ„Щ’Ш№ЩҠЩҶШ§Щғ ЩҠШ§ Щ…ЩҶЩҮЩҲ ЩӮШҜЩ‘ЩҠ
ШЈШҙЩҮШҜ ЩҲЩ’ЩҮШ°ЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш®ЩҠШұШ© Щ„Ш§ ЩӮШ§Щ„ЩҲ Ш®ЩҠШұШ©
 
вҖ”-
 
ШҘШӯШіШ§Ші ШЈШұЩӮЩү Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШәШұШ§Щ… 
Щ…ЩҲ ШӯЩҸШЁ Ш№Ш§ШҜЩҠ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШіЩ„Ш§Щ…
Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҮ ЩҠЩҗЩҖЩҖШ№Щ’ЩҖЩ„ЩҺЩҖЩ… ЩҲШҙЩғШ«ЩҗШұ ...
 ШҙШ§ЩҠЩ„ Щ„Щғ ШЁЩӮЩ„ШЁЩҠ ЩғЩ„Ш§Щ…
 
вҖ”-
 
ЩғЩ„ ШҙЩҠ ШЁЩғ ЩҠЩҶШӯШЁ .. Ш·ЩҠШЁ ЩҲ ШӘШӯШҜЩ‘ЩҠ
ЩҮШЁЩҠШ© ЩҲ ШҙЩ…ЩҲШ® ЩҲ ШұЩҸЩҲШӯ ЩҲШ§ШҙЩҠШ§ ЩғШ«ЩҠШұШ©
Щ…ШҜШұЩҠ ЩҲШҙ Ш§ЩҲШөЩҗЩҒ ЩҒЩҠЩғ ЩҲЩ„Ш§Щ‘ ШҙЩҺШ№ЩҺШҜЩ‘ЩҠ
ЩҲЩ’ЩғЩ„Щ‘Щғ Ш№Щ„Щү ШЁШ№Ш¶ЩҗЩғ ЩҠШ§ ШҘЩҶШӘЩҠ Щ…Ш«ЩҖЩҠЩҖШұШ©
 
ШӯЩҺШөЩ‘ЩҶЩҖШӘЩҖЩғ ШЁЩ’ЩҖЩӮЩ„ШЁЩҠ ЩҲШ§ШӯШ§ШіЩҠШі ЩҲЩҗШҜЩ‘ЩҠ
ШЁЩҗШіЩ… Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҠ Ш®Ш§Щ„ЩӮ ШІЩҠЩҶЩғ ЩҲЩ’ ЩҶШіШӘШ®ЩҠШұЩҮ
ШІЩҠЩҶЩғ ЩҮШ°Ш§Щғ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҠ ШҘЩҶШ®Щ„ЩӮ Щ„Щ„ШӘЩҗЩҖЩҒЩҗШҜЩ‘ЩҠ
ШЈЩҒШҜШ§ЩҮ ШЈЩҶШ§ ЩҲЩ’ ЩҠЩҖЩҒЩҖШҜШ§ЩҮ ШәЩҠЩҖШұЩҠ ЩҲШәЩҠЩҖШұЩҮ
 
вҖ”-
 
ШҘШӯШіШ§Ші ШЈШұЩӮЩү Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШәШұШ§Щ… 
Щ…ЩҲ ШӯЩҸШЁ Ш№Ш§ШҜЩҠ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШіЩ„Ш§Щ…
Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҮ ЩҠЩҗЩҖЩҖШ№Щ’ЩҖЩ„ЩҺЩҖЩ… ЩҲШҙЩғШ«ЩҗШұ ...
 ШҙШ§ЩҠЩ„ Щ„Щғ ШЁЩӮЩ„ШЁЩҠ ЩғЩ„Ш§Щ…
 
вҖ”-
 
 
ШЁЩғ ЩҠШ§ ШіЩҺШ№ЩҺШҜ Ш№ЩҠЩҶ ЩҚ ШӘЩҖШұШ§Щғ ЩҲЩ’ ЩҠШ§ШіЩҗШ№ШҜЩҠ
ЩҲЩҺШ¬ЩҮЩҗЩғ ШөШЁШ§ШӯЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш°ШЁ ЩҲШҘШӯШіШ§ШіЩҠ Ш·ЩҠШұЩҮ
ЩҲШҙ ЩӮЩҺШҜ ШЈШӯШЁЩ‘Щғ .. Щ…ШҜШұЩҠ ШЁШі ШҘЩҶШӘЩҠ Ш№ЩҗШҜЩ‘ЩҠ
ШӯЩҸШЁЩ‘Щғ ЩҒШ¶Ш§ ЩҲЩ’ ЩҠШ¬ШұЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ ШҜЩ…Щ‘ЩҠ ШЈШ«ЩҖЩҠЩҖШұЩҮ
 
ЩғЩ„ ШӯШ§Ш¬Ш© Щ…ЩҶЩ‘Щғ ШӯЩ„ЩҲШ© Ш№ Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩ„ШЁ Ш№ЩҶШҜЩҠ
ШӯШӘЩү Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҖЩҒЩҖШ§ШөЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШЁШіЩҠШ·Ш© ЩғШЁЩҠЩҖШұШ©
ШҘЩ„Ш§Щ‘ ШәЩҖЩҠЩҖШ§ШЁЩғ ЩҠЩҖЩӮЩҖЩ„ЩҗШЁ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШұШӯЩҖШ© Ш¶ШҜЩ‘ЩҠ
ЩҲЩҠЩ’Ш®Щ„Щ‘ЩҠ ЩҮШ§Щ„ШҜЩҶЩҠЩҖШ§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш№ЩҠЩҶЩҠ ШөШәЩҠЩҖШұШ©
 
вҖ”-
 
ШҘШӯШіШ§Ші ШЈШұЩӮЩү Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШәШұШ§Щ… 
Щ…ЩҲ ШӯЩҸШЁ Ш№Ш§ШҜЩҠ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШіЩ„Ш§Щ…
Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҮ ЩҠЩҗЩҖЩҖШ№Щ’ЩҖЩ„ЩҺЩҖЩ… ЩҲШҙЩғШ«ЩҗШұ ...
 ШҙШ§ЩҠЩ„ Щ„Щғ ШЁЩӮЩ„ШЁЩҠ ЩғЩ„Ш§Щ…
 
вҖ”-

Щ…ЩҮЩҶШҜШі ШөЩҲШӘ: Щ…ШӯЩ…ШҜ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ„ЩҠ
Щ…ШӘШ§ШЁШ№Ш© ЩҲШӘЩҶШіЩҠЩӮ: Ш§Щ„ШӯШіЩҠЩҶ ШҜЩҲШ®ЩҠ
ШҙЩғШұ Ш®Ш§Шө: ШӯШіЩҶ Ш·Ш§Щ„ШЁ


ШҘШҙШӘШұЩғ Ш№Щ„ЩҠ ЩӮЩҶШ§Ш© ШұЩҲШӘШ§ЩҶШ§ | Subscribe To Rotana Channel https://bit.ly/2NjviPh

ЩғЩ„Щ…Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈШәЩҶЩҠШ©

ШӯЩҗШіЩ‘Щғ ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜЩҠ ЩҲШҘЩҶШӘЩҠ ШЁШ§Щ„ШҜЩҶЩҠШ§ Ш№ЩҶШҜЩҠ
ЩҲШҘЩҶШӘЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ ЩӮЩ„ШЁЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲЩ„Щү ЩҲШҘЩҶШӘЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ®ЩҠШұШ©
ЩҲЩҮШ§Щ„ШӯШЁ Щ„ЩҲ ЩҠЩҶЩҖШҙШ§ЩҒ ЩҲШўШЁЩҖЩҲШӯ ШіЩҺЩҖШҜЩ‘ЩҠ
ШҙЩҒШӘЩҠ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҘШӯШіШ§Ші Щ…Ш§ ЩҠЩғЩҒЩҠ ШҜЩҠШұШ©
 
ЩҲЩ’ЩҠШ§ Ш№Ш§ЩҠЩҖШҙЩҖШ© ШЁЩӮЩ„ШЁЩҠ ШЈЩҶЩҖШ§ Ш§Щ„ЩҖЩҲШҜ ЩҲШҜЩ‘ЩҠ
ШұЩҲШӯЩҠ ШЈЩӮЩҖШҜЩ‘Щ…ЩҮЩҖШ§ Щ„ЩҖШ№ЩҠЩҖЩҶЩҖЩғ ШЈШіЩҖЩҠЩҖШұШ©
ЩҲШҘЩҶ ШұШ§ШӯШӘ Щ„Щ’Ш№ЩҠЩҶШ§Щғ ЩҠШ§ Щ…ЩҶЩҮЩҲ ЩӮШҜЩ‘ЩҠ
ШЈШҙЩҮШҜ ЩҲЩ’ЩҮШ°ЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш®ЩҠШұШ© Щ„Ш§ ЩӮШ§Щ„ЩҲ Ш®ЩҠШұШ©
 
вҖ”-
 
ШҘШӯШіШ§Ші ШЈШұЩӮЩү Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШәШұШ§Щ… 
Щ…ЩҲ ШӯЩҸШЁ Ш№Ш§ШҜЩҠ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШіЩ„Ш§Щ…
Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҮ ЩҠЩҗЩҖЩҖШ№Щ’ЩҖЩ„ЩҺЩҖЩ… ЩҲШҙЩғШ«ЩҗШұ ...
 ШҙШ§ЩҠЩ„ Щ„Щғ ШЁЩӮЩ„ШЁЩҠ ЩғЩ„Ш§Щ…
 
вҖ”-
 
ЩғЩ„ ШҙЩҠ ШЁЩғ ЩҠЩҶШӯШЁ .. Ш·ЩҠШЁ ЩҲ ШӘШӯШҜЩ‘ЩҠ
ЩҮШЁЩҠШ© ЩҲ ШҙЩ…ЩҲШ® ЩҲ ШұЩҸЩҲШӯ ЩҲШ§ШҙЩҠШ§ ЩғШ«ЩҠШұШ©
Щ…ШҜШұЩҠ ЩҲШҙ Ш§ЩҲШөЩҗЩҒ ЩҒЩҠЩғ ЩҲЩ„Ш§Щ‘ ШҙЩҺШ№ЩҺШҜЩ‘ЩҠ
ЩҲЩ’ЩғЩ„Щ‘Щғ Ш№Щ„Щү ШЁШ№Ш¶ЩҗЩғ ЩҠШ§ ШҘЩҶШӘЩҠ Щ…Ш«ЩҖЩҠЩҖШұШ©
 
ШӯЩҺШөЩ‘ЩҶЩҖШӘЩҖЩғ ШЁЩ’ЩҖЩӮЩ„ШЁЩҠ ЩҲШ§ШӯШ§ШіЩҠШі ЩҲЩҗШҜЩ‘ЩҠ
ШЁЩҗШіЩ… Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҠ Ш®Ш§Щ„ЩӮ ШІЩҠЩҶЩғ ЩҲЩ’ ЩҶШіШӘШ®ЩҠШұЩҮ
ШІЩҠЩҶЩғ ЩҮШ°Ш§Щғ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҠ ШҘЩҶШ®Щ„ЩӮ Щ„Щ„ШӘЩҗЩҖЩҒЩҗШҜЩ‘ЩҠ
ШЈЩҒШҜШ§ЩҮ ШЈЩҶШ§ ЩҲЩ’ ЩҠЩҖЩҒЩҖШҜШ§ЩҮ ШәЩҠЩҖШұЩҠ ЩҲШәЩҠЩҖШұЩҮ
 
вҖ”-
 
ШҘШӯШіШ§Ші ШЈШұЩӮЩү Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШәШұШ§Щ… 
Щ…ЩҲ ШӯЩҸШЁ Ш№Ш§ШҜЩҠ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШіЩ„Ш§Щ…
Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҮ ЩҠЩҗЩҖЩҖШ№Щ’ЩҖЩ„ЩҺЩҖЩ… ЩҲШҙЩғШ«ЩҗШұ ...
 ШҙШ§ЩҠЩ„ Щ„Щғ ШЁЩӮЩ„ШЁЩҠ ЩғЩ„Ш§Щ…
 
вҖ”-
 
 
ШЁЩғ ЩҠШ§ ШіЩҺШ№ЩҺШҜ Ш№ЩҠЩҶ ЩҚ ШӘЩҖШұШ§Щғ ЩҲЩ’ ЩҠШ§ШіЩҗШ№ШҜЩҠ
ЩҲЩҺШ¬ЩҮЩҗЩғ ШөШЁШ§ШӯЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш°ШЁ ЩҲШҘШӯШіШ§ШіЩҠ Ш·ЩҠШұЩҮ
ЩҲШҙ ЩӮЩҺШҜ ШЈШӯШЁЩ‘Щғ .. Щ…ШҜШұЩҠ ШЁШі ШҘЩҶШӘЩҠ Ш№ЩҗШҜЩ‘ЩҠ
ШӯЩҸШЁЩ‘Щғ ЩҒШ¶Ш§ ЩҲЩ’ ЩҠШ¬ШұЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ ШҜЩ…Щ‘ЩҠ ШЈШ«ЩҖЩҠЩҖШұЩҮ
 
ЩғЩ„ ШӯШ§Ш¬Ш© Щ…ЩҶЩ‘Щғ ШӯЩ„ЩҲШ© Ш№ Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩ„ШЁ Ш№ЩҶШҜЩҠ
ШӯШӘЩү Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҖЩҒЩҖШ§ШөЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШЁШіЩҠШ·Ш© ЩғШЁЩҠЩҖШұШ©
ШҘЩ„Ш§Щ‘ ШәЩҖЩҠЩҖШ§ШЁЩғ ЩҠЩҖЩӮЩҖЩ„ЩҗШЁ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШұШӯЩҖШ© Ш¶ШҜЩ‘ЩҠ
ЩҲЩҠЩ’Ш®Щ„Щ‘ЩҠ ЩҮШ§Щ„ШҜЩҶЩҠЩҖШ§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш№ЩҠЩҶЩҠ ШөШәЩҠЩҖШұШ©
 
вҖ”-

snippet.title: Watch NASAвҖҷs Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover вҖ“ the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space вҖ“ search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASAвҖҷs Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32вҖҷ to tie at one and added two more in the 65вҖҷ and 85вҖҷ. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70вҖҷ to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27вҖҷ by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports

#UEFA #ChampionsLeague #UCL #Roundof16 #HatTrick #MBappe #Kean #Messi #PSG #Barcelona #ParisSaintGermain #Barca (edited)

snippet.title: Mars Rover Landing Overview- NOW SAFE ON MARS!!!
snippet.description:
This will be cooler than the Super Bowl. Thanks to Bill and Melinda Gates for partnering with me on this video. Read the 2021 Annual Letter, here: http://gatesnot.es/3cfnMF6

Watch the live stream- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gm0b_ijaYMQ&ab_channel=NASA
Main rover landing page- https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/
Cool rover interactive animation of the 7 mins of terror- https://eyes.nasa.gov/apps/mars2020/#/home?id=surface_operations&time=2021-02-18T12:44:05.006-08:00&rate=0
Spin the rover around in 3D- https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/spacecraft/rover/

Here is the video about why we should explore space even with problems here on Earth- https://youtu.be/lARpY0nIQx0

Music for the montage-

Explosions in the Sky
(Post-rock, four-member band from Texas.)

First Breath After Coma
https://youtu.be/w0o8JCxjjpM

Your Hand In Mine
https://youtu.be/cdiY6kijYHE

Song at 11:21- Bottles by A Shell in the Pit- https://open.spotify.com/track/0m6GMysIDx3gcQc6TF6HEX?si=FhjTlbBbQKayFrYtrw0dlg

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure SupermanвҖҷs (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube

Be the first to know more:

snippet.title: ШІЩҲШ¬Ш© Щ…ШӯЩ…ШҜ Ш§Щ„ШҙЩҶШ§ЩҲЩҠ ЩҲ Ш§ЩҲЩ„Ш§ШҜЩҮ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§ШіШӘЩӮШЁШ§Щ„ЩҮ ШЁЩ…Ш·Ш§Шұ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ§ЩҮШұШ©
snippet.description:
ЩҲШөЩ„ШӘ ШЁШ№Ш«Ш© Ш§Щ„ЩҒШұЩҠЩӮ Ш§Щ„ЩғШұЩҲЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲЩ„ ШЁШ§Щ„ЩҶШ§ШҜЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҮЩ„ЩҠ ШҘЩ„Щү Щ…Ш·Ш§Шұ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ§ЩҮШұШ©ШҢ ЩӮШ§ШҜЩ…Ш© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§ШөЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ·ШұЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲШӯШ©ШҢ ШЁШ№ШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӘШӘЩҲЩҠШ¬ ШЁШЁШұЩҲЩҶШІЩҠШ© ЩғШЈШі Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ… ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ШұЩғШІ Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш§Щ„Ш« ШЁЩ…ЩҲЩҶШҜЩҠШ§Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҶШҜЩҠШ©.
ЩҲЩҲШөЩ„ШӘ ШЁШ№Ш«Ш© Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҮЩ„ЩҠ Ш№ШЁШұ Ш§Щ„Ш·Ш§ШҰШұШ© Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш§ШөШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘШ§ШЁШ№Ш© Щ„Щ…ШөШұ Щ„Щ„Ш·ЩҠШұШ§ЩҶШҢ ЩҲЩғШ§ЩҶ Ш·Ш§ЩӮЩ… Ш·Ш§ШҰШұШ© Щ…ШөШұ Щ„Щ„Ш·ЩҠШұШ§ЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘЩӮШЁЩ„ ШЁШ№Ш«Ш© Ш§Щ„ЩҒШұЩҠЩӮ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Ш·Ш§Шұ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲШӯШ© Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲЩ„ЩҠ ШЁШ§Щ„ЩҲШұЩҲШҜ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШҙЩҠЩғЩҲЩ„Ш§ШӘШ© ШЁШ№ШҜ ШӘШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮЩҮЩ… Ш§Щ„ШҘЩҶШ¬Ш§ШІ Ш§Щ„ШұЩҠШ§Ш¶ЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜ ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШ§ШұЩҠШ® ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§ШҜЩҠ.

ШӯШ¶Шұ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§ШіШӘЩӮШЁШ§Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ№Ш«Ш© Ш№ШҜШҜ ЩғШЁЩҠШұ Щ…ЩҶ Ш¬Щ…Ш§ЩҮЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§ШҜЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҮЩ„ЩҠ Щ„ШӘЩҮЩҶШҰШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҒШұЩҠЩӮ ШЁШ№ШҜ ШӘШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮЩҮ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҲШІ ШЁШ§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШҜШ§Щ„ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШЁШұЩҲЩҶШІЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„Щ…ШұШ© Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШ§ШұЩҠШ®ЩҮ.

ЩҲШ§ЩҶШӘШёЩ…ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш®ШҜЩ…Ш§ШӘ ШЁЩ…ШӯЩҠШ· ШөШ§Щ„Ш© Ш§Щ„ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ ШЁЩ…Ш·Ш§Шұ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ§ЩҮШұШ©ШҢ ЩҲШ·Ш§Щ„ШЁШӘ В«Ш№Щ…Щ„ЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш·Ш§ШұВ» Ш§Щ„Ш¬Щ…Ш§ЩҮЩҠШұ ШЁШ¶ШұЩҲШұШ© Ш§Щ„Ш§Щ„ШӘШІШ§Щ… ШЁШ§Щ„ШӘШЁШ§Ш№ШҜ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§Щ„ШӘШІШ§Щ… ШЁШ§Щ„ШӘШӯШ°ЩҠШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩӮШ§ШҰЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҘШөШ§ШЁШ© ШЁЩғЩҲЩҒЩҠШҜ 19.

snippet.title: Dodge Challenger Demon v Porsche 911 Turbo S - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

ItвҖҷs time for an almighty USA vs Germany drag race! 

MatвҖҷs in the absolutely huge Dodge Challenge Demon, and heвҖҷs lining up against Yianni in the Porsche 911 Turbo S! 

When you compare them on paper, it looks like the Dodge has it in the bag. With a humungous 6.2-litre supercharged V8 under its massive bonnet, the Challenge Demon can put down 808hp and 972Nm! As a result, it seemingly dwarfs the 911 Turbo S, which has a 3.8-litre twin-turbo flat-six, which can produce 650hp & 800Nm. 

But of course, this isnвҖҷt the first time weвҖҷve driven a Porsche 911 Turbo S on this channel, and we know youвҖҷre pretty much guaranteed a 1/4 mile time of less than 10.5 seconds! 

So how do you think this will play out? Will the Dodge be able to put its power down? Or is the Porsche set to grab another victory? 

YouвҖҷll have to keep watching to find out!

Thanks to CS Panda for lending us the Dodge - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCxwBVsAoWWkQjKmSKOx5u2A

.............................................................

snippet.title: Hog Mountain Challenge Is On! (Clash Of Clans Lunar New Year Special)
snippet.description:
Do you have what it takes to conquer the mighty Golden Dragon and beat the Hog Mountain challenge? Earn 2 Builder Potions, Gems and Resources by scoring 3 stars in one attack during this Lunar New Year special event! 

Featuring: the Warrior King skin, the brand new Hog Mountain scenery, the Wall Breaker decoration, and the Lucky Shrub seasonal obstacle. Also a blast from the past: the Warrior Queen skin! 



Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter в–ә https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram в–әhttps://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook в–әhttps://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-Вӯfilled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

ParentвҖҷs Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

ШЁШұЩҶШ§Щ…Ш¬ Щ…ШіШ§ШЎ Ш§ЩҲЩҶ ШӘШ§ЩҠЩ… ЩҠЩӮШҜЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш№Щ„Ш§Щ…Щү ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ШӯЩ„Щ„ Ш§Щ„ЩғШЁЩҠШұ Щ…ШҜШӯШӘ ШҙЩ„ШЁЩҠ ШӯЩҠШ« Ш§ЩҶЩҮ ЩҠШіШӘШ¶ЩҠЩҒ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШҜЩҠШҜ Щ…ЩҶ ЩҶШ¬ЩҲЩ… Ш§Щ„ЩғШұШ© ЩҲЩҠЩғШҙЩҒ Ш§Щ„ЩғШ«ЩҠШұ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲШ§Щ„ЩҠШі Щ„Щ„Ш¬Щ…Ш§ЩҮЩҠШұ Ш№ЩҶ ШӯЩҠШ§ШӘЩҮЩ… ЩҲЩ…ЩҲШ§ЩӮЩҒ ШӘШ№ШұШ¶ЩҲШ§ Щ„ЩҮШ§ ШҜШ§Ш®Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ„Ш№ШЁ ЩҲШ®Ш§ШұШ¬Ш© ЩҲЩҠЩӮЩҲЩ… ШЁШӘШӯЩ„ЩҠЩ„ ШҙШ§Щ…Щ„ Щ„Щ„Щ…ШЁШ§ШұЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯЩ„ЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© ЩҠШ°Ш§Ш№ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш«Щ„Ш§Ш«Ш§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„Ш®Щ…ЩҠШі Ш§Щ„ШіШ§Ш№ЩҮ 11 Щ…ШіШ§ШЎЩӢ

Щ„Щ…ШҙШ§ЩҮШҜШ© Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ„ЩӮШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩғШ§Щ…Щ„Ш©:https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLR5xYuItOY_oDu0e-I_bgJMkyRuKQf_Tk 
Щ„Щ…ШҙШ§ЩҮШҜШ© Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ„ЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„ЩғШ§Щ…Щ„Ш©: https://youtu.be/8W46c2exvKk

Щ„Щ…ШӘШ§ШЁШ№Ш© Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ®ШЁШ§Шұ Ш§Щ„ШұЩҠШ§Ш¶ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӯШөШұЩҠШ© ЩҲЩ…ЩҲШ§Ш№ЩҠШҜ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШЁШ§ШұЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§ШҙШӘШұЩғ Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩҶ: https://bit.ly/334Ed0r

snippet.title: ШҙЩҲЩҒ ЩҠЩҲШіЩҒ ЩҲШіШ§ШұШ© ШЁЩҠЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮЩҲШ§ Ш§Щ„ШӯШұШ§Щ…ЩҠШ© ШҘШІШ§ЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…Ш§ШұШ©.. ШөШұЩҠШ® Ш¶ШӯЩғ#ЩҒЩҠ_ШЁЩҠШӘЩҶШ§_ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘ
snippet.description:
ШҙЩҲЩҒ ЩҠЩҲШіЩҒ ЩҲШіШ§ШұШ© ШЁЩҠЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮЩҲШ§ Ш§Щ„ШӯШұШ§Щ…ЩҠШ© ШҘШІШ§ЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…Ш§ШұШ©.. ШөШұЩҠШ® Ш¶ШӯЩғ#ЩҒЩҠ_ШЁЩҠШӘЩҶШ§_ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘ 

Ш¬ШІШЎ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ„ЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„ШұШ§ШЁШ№Ш© Ш№ШҙШұ Щ…ЩҶ Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ #ЩҒЩҠ_ШЁЩҠШӘЩҶШ§_ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘ
ШЁШ·ЩҲЩ„Ш© :  ШЁШ·ЩҲЩ„Ш© ШҙЩҠЩ…Ш§ШЎ ШіЩҠЩҒШҢ ЩҮШҙШ§Щ… Ш¬Щ…Ш§Щ„ШҢ Ш№Щ…ШұЩҲ ЩҲЩҮШЁШ©ШҢ ШҜЩ„Ш§Щ„ Ш№ШЁШҜ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШІЩҠШІШҢ Щ„ЩҠЩ„Щү ШЈШӯЩ…ШҜ ШІШ§ЩҮШұШҢ Щ„ЩҠЩ„Щү Ш№ШІ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШұШЁШҢ ЩҲШ№ШҜШҜ Щ…ЩҶ Ш¶ЩҠЩҲЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШҙШұЩҒ 
ЩҠШ№ШұШ¶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§Ш№ЩҠШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ§Щ„ЩҠШ©
 ШҢ.
ЩӮЩҶШ§Ш© cbc Ш№ШұШ¶ ШЈЩҲЩ„ 8 Щ…ШіШ§ШЎ
ШҘШ№Ш§ШҜШ© 2:30 ШөШЁШ§ШӯШ§ШҢ 12 ШёЩҮШұШ§
ЩӮЩҶШ§Ш© cbc ШҜШұШ§Щ…Ш§ 11Щ…ШіШ§ШЎ
ЩҲШҘШ№Ш§ШҜШ© 5 ШөШЁШ§ШӯШ§ШҢ ЩҲ2 ШёЩҮШұШ§
ШӘШҜЩҲШұ ШЈШӯШҜШ§Ш« Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ ШЁЩҠШӘЩҶШ§ ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘШҢ ШӯЩҲЩ„ ШЈШіШұШ© ШҙШ§ШЁШ© Щ…ЩғЩҲЩҶШ© Щ…ЩҶ ШІЩҲШ¬ ЩҲШІЩҲШ¬Ш© ЩҲЩҠШ№Щ…Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШІЩҲШ¬ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩғЩҶЩҲЩ„ЩҲШ¬ЩҠШ§ШҢ ЩҒЩҠЩӮЩҲЩ… ШЁШ§Ш®ШӘШұШ§Ш№ Ш№ШҜШҜ Щ…ЩҶ В«Ш§Щ„ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘВ»ШҢ ЩҲШӘЩӮШұШұ Ш§Щ„ШІЩҲШ¬Ш© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШ¬ШіШҜ ШҜЩҲШұЩҮШ§ Щ„ЩҠЩ„Щү ШІШ§ЩҮШұ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ№Ш§ЩҶШ© ШЁШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘ Щ„Щ„Ш№ЩҠШҙ Щ…Ш№ЩҮЩ… ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШІЩ„ШҢ ЩҠЩӮЩ„ШЁ ШӯЩҠШ§ШӘЩҮЩ… ШұШЈШіЩӢШ§ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш№ЩӮШЁ ЩҒЩҠ ШҘШ·Ш§Шұ ЩғЩҲЩ…ЩҠШҜЩҠ.
ШҙШ§ЩҮШҜ Щ…ЩӮШ§Ш·Ш№ Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ #ЩҒЩҠ_ШЁЩҠШӘЩҶШ§_ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘ:  


 #2021 #ШҙЩҠЩ…Ш§ШЎ_ШіЩҠЩҒ #ЩҒЩҠ_ШЁЩҠШӘЩҶШ§_ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘ
ШӘШЈЩ„ЩҠЩҒ : ШЈШӯЩ…ШҜ Щ…ШӯЩҠЩҠ ЩҲ Щ…ШӯЩ…ШҜ Щ…ШӯЩ…ШҜЩҠ 
ШҘШ®ШұШ§Ш¬ : ЩҲЩ„ЩҠШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ„ЩҒШ§ЩҲЩҠ
ШҘЩҶШӘШ§Ш¬ : Synergy #Synergy ШӘШ§Щ…Шұ Щ…ШұШіЩҠ
ШҙШұЩғШ© ШіЩҠЩҶШұШ¬Щү Щ„Щ„Ш§ЩҶШӘШ§Ш¬ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩ„ЩҠЩҒШІЩҠЩҲЩҶЩү ЩҲШ§Щ„ШіЩҠЩҶЩ…Ш§ШҰЩү ЩҲШ®ШҜЩ…Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ШҘШ№Щ„Ш§ЩҶ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш№Щ„Ш§ЩӮШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш©


Ш§ШҙШӘШұЩғ ЩҒЩү Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҶШ§Ш© Ш§Щ„ШұШіЩ…ЩҠШ© : http://bit.ly/Synergyofficial

snippet.title: Groove Mera | HBL PSL Official Anthem 2021 | Naseebo Lal, Aima Baig & Young Stunners | #HBLPSL6
snippet.description:
Groove Mera | HBL PSL Official Anthem 2021 | Naseebo Lal, Aima Baig & Young Stunners | #HBLPSL6

Groove with us to the official HBL PSL 6 anthem as we celebrate the moments of finesse that one finds in the heart of every cricket match. 

This yearвҖҷs anthem also reflects the realities of COVID-19. As a number of fans will be watching PakistanвҖҷs biggest sporting event remotely, the anthem cheers on players on the field and their fans at home to celebrate their groove!

The anthem is a celebration of PakistanвҖҷs musical diversity as Naseebo Lal, Aima Baig and Young Stunners come together to sing the HBL PSL anthem for the first time ever. The mix of artists is particularly exciting as it represents artists from opposite ends of PakistanвҖҷs musical spectrum. The anthem brings together voices from PakistanвҖҷs rich musical landscape: regional folk and urban sounds of pop and hip-hop.

Music Produced by Xulfi
Agency: Giraffe Pakistan
Composed by Xulfi and Adnan Dhool
Lyrics: Adnan Dhool, Young Stunners (Talha Younus, Talha Anjum)
Associate Music Producer: Bilal Haider
Executive Producer: Muhammad Ibrahim
Operations Manager: Saad Mansoor
Vocals: Naseebo Lal, Aima Baig, Young Stunners 
Recorded and Mixed by Xulfi @ Xth Harmonic
Mastered by Chris Gehringer @ Sterling Sound, Edgewater NJ.
Production House: Seeme Production 
Executive Producer: Shehzad Ahmed 
Producer: Madiha Majeed 
Director: Fida Moin
DOP: Zain Haleem 
Post Producer: Faisal Shaikh 
Edit: Ahsan Raza 
Grade: Tahir Moosa 
Post and animation: Owais Roy, Post Island

snippet.title: I Spent 100 Hours Customizing The World's Largest PS5 ($70,000)
snippet.description:
I can't believe we spent 100 hours customizing the world's largest Playstation 5 and gave PS5's away to subscribers lol

Hope you enjoyed! Subscribe right now and you'll be a part of the giveaways! Thanks for watching :)

If you're not yet subscribed, I promise you won't regret subscribing! If you're already subscribed, I love you! вқӨпёҸ
Subscribe and you might be picked to be in my next video! It's free and it would genuinely make me super happy if you subscribed! рҹҘә

Subscribe to all our channels!
ZHC Crafts: @ZHC Crafts 
ZHC Shorts: @ZHC Shorts 
MsMunchie: @MsMunchie 

This PS5 is 10 feet tall (3 meters) weighs 500 pounds (227 kilograms) and cost me $70,000 in total! This playstation 5 is insane! We spent over 4 months putting together this video for you!

Follow my socials too!
Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/zhc
Twitter - https://twitter.com/zhc_yt
Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/ZHC/

If you scrolled till the end... i luv u рҹҘәвқӨпёҸ

snippet.title: Ш§ЩҶШӯШЁШіШӘ Щ…Ш№ ЩғЩ„ШЁ Щ…ШіШ№ЩҲШұ
snippet.description:
Щ…ЩҶ Щ…ЩҲШ§ЩӮЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҠ Щ…ШіШӘШӯЩҠЩ„ Ш§ЩҶШіШ§ЩҮШ§ , ЩҒЩҠ ШӯШҜШ§ Щ…Шұ ШЁЩҶЩҒШі Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲЩӮЩҒ Щ…ЩҶ ЩӮШЁЩ„ Шҹ
Ш§Ш°Ш§ ШӯШЁЩҠШӘЩҲШ§ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҠШҜЩҠЩҲ Ш§ЩҒШ¶Щ„ ШҙЩҠ Щ…Щ…ЩғЩҶ ШӘШ№Щ…Щ„ЩҲЩҮ Щ„Щ„ЩҒЩҠШҜЩҠЩҲ ЩҮЩҲ Щ…ШҙШ§ШұЩғШӘЩғЩ… Ш§ЩҠШ§ЩҮ Щ…Ш№ Ш§ШөШҜЩӮШ§ШҰЩғЩ… , ЩҲЩ…ШұШұЩҮ ШұШ§Шӯ Ш§ЩҒШұШӯ Ш§Ш°Ш§ Ш№Щ…Щ„ШӘЩҲШ§ Щ„Ш§ЩҠЩғ ЩҲ ЩғШӘШЁШӘЩҲШ§ ЩғЩҲЩ…ЩҶШӘ ШӯЩ„ЩҲ Щ…Ш«Щ„ЩғЩ…

ШҙЩҲ ШұШ§ЩҠЩғЩ… ШӘШҙЩҲЩҒЩҲШ§ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШІШЎ Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩҲЩ„ Щ…ЩҶ ШіЩ„ШіЩ„Ш© Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§ЩӮЩҒ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯШұШ¬Ш© Ш№Щ„Щү ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШұШ§ШЁШ·

snippet.title: Billie Eilish: The WorldвҖҷs A Little Blurry вҖ” Official Trailer #2 | Apple TV+
snippet.description:
Witness the incredible rise of Billie Eilish in "Billie Eilish: The WorldвҖҷs A Little BlurryвҖқ as she tours and records the album that changes her life. Watch on Apple TV+ February 26: https://apple.co/_BillieEilishDoc 

"Billie Eilish: The WorldвҖҷs A Little BlurryвҖқ tells the true coming-of-age story of the singer-songwriter and her rise to global superstardom. From award-winning filmmaker R.J. Cutler, the documentary offers a deeply intimate look at this extraordinary teenagerвҖҷs journey, at just seventeen years old, navigating life on the road, on stage, and at home with her family, while writing, recording and releasing her debut album вҖңWHEN WE ALL FALL ASLEEP, WHERE DO WE GO?вҖқ 

The documentary is from Apple Original Films, in association with Interscope Films, Darkroom, This Machine and Lighthouse Management & Media. Directed by R.J. Cutler and starring Billie Eilish, Finneas OвҖҷConnell, Maggie Baird, and Patrick OвҖҷConnell as themselves. 

Song:
вҖңbury a friendвҖқ by Billie Eilish http://apple.co/buryafriend

snippet.title: Ez Mil performs "Panalo" LIVE on the Wish USA Bus
snippet.description:
Ez Mil is back on the Wish USA Bus with a live performance of his rap track "Panalo"! The catchy R&B beat expresses the singer's take on Filipino nationalism. 

Follow Ez Mil on social media:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/EazyMil
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ezekielmiller/
YouTube: @Ez Mil 
Twitter: @EzMil27

#EzMil #Panalo #WishUSA
***

Wish USA is an innovative moving music platform based in Los Angeles, California. Like its Philippines counterpart, the Wish 107.5 FM radio station, it strives to be a gateway wherein various musical talents can perform and showcase their music with the world. With the Wish USA Bus, people can now see their favorite artists perform live in an environment open to all.

Launched with the Wish USA Bus, the platform is a much-loved musical experience that advocates in supporting talented musicians from different genres. From Wish 107.5 to Wish USA, Wish has transformed itself from being a music station on wheels to a sought-after musical platform.

For more information, you may contact the following: 
info@wish1075.co 
aromero@wish1075.co 
scos@wish1075.co 

Get more WISHclusive updates:
Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/WishUSAMusic
Twitter: http://www.twitter.com/WishUSAMusic
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/wishusamusic

Feel free to SHARE this video but DO NOT RE-UPLOAD. Thank you!

snippet.title: ШЁЩ…ЩҶШ§ШіШЁШ© 12 Щ…Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩҶ ЩӮЩҒШІШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш·Ш§ШҰШұШ©рҹҳЁ
snippet.description:
Ш§ШіЩ… Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШұЩҲШ№

ШЁЩҠЩҲШӘ ШҘЩҠЩҲШ§ШЎ Щ„Щ„Ш§Ш¬ШҰЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҲШұЩҠЩҠЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ ШҙЩ…Ш§Щ„ ШіЩҲШұЩҠШ§ 
https://alnouri.org/59074

Щ…Ш§ ШҙШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҮрҹҳӯШ¬ШЁЩҶШ§ Ш§Щ„10ШЈЩ„Ш§ЩҒ ШҜЩҠЩҶШ§Шұ(30ШЈЩ„ЩҒ ШҜЩҲЩ„Ш§Шұ) ШЁШЈЩҲЩ„ ШіШ§Ш№ШӘЩҠЩҶ
 ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӯЩ…ШҜЩ„Щ„ЩҮвқӨпёҸвқӨпёҸвқӨпёҸрҹҷҸрҹҸҪ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҮ ЩҠШ¬Ш№Щ„ЩҮШ§ ШЁЩ…ЩҠШІШ§ЩҶ ШӯШіЩҶШ§ШӘЩғЩ… ЩҠШ§ШұШЁрҹӨІрҹҸҪ
ЩғЩ„Щ…Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш¬Щ…Ш№ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш®ЩҠШұЩҠШ© ЩҠШұЩҒШ№ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШЁЩ„Шә 10 ШЈЩ„Ш§ЩҒ Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҠШ© Ш№ШҙШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Ші 
Ш§Щ„ЩҠ Щ…Ш§Щ„ШӯЩӮШӘ Ш№Щ„Щү ШЈШ¬Шұ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШёЩҠЩ… ЩҲЩҶШіШ§Ш№ШҜ ШЈЩғШ«Шұ Ш№ШҜШҜ Щ…Щ…ЩғЩҶ Щ…ЩҶ ШЈШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҶШ§ 
ЩҲШЈШҙЩӮШ§ШҰЩҶШ§ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯШӘШ§Ш¬ЩҠЩҶрҹҷҸрҹҸҪ 
Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҮ ЩҠШӯЩҒШёЩҮЩ… ЩҲЩҠШ№ЩҠЩҶЩҮЩ… ЩҲЩҠШұШІЩӮЩҮЩ… Щ…ЩҶ ЩҲШ§ШіШ№ ЩҒШ¶Щ„ЩҮрҹӨІрҹҸҪ 

ШҙЩғШұШ§ЩӢ Щ„Щғ ЩҠШ§ ЩҒШ§Ш№Щ„ Ш§Щ„Ш®ЩҠШұрҹҢ№ЩҲШӘШ°ЩғШұ Щ…Ш§ ЩҶЩӮШө Щ…Ш§Щ„ Ш№ШЁШҜ Щ…ЩҶ ШөШҜЩӮШ©рҹҢә


ШұШ§Шӯ Ш§ШҙШұШӯ Ш№ЩҶ ЩғЩҠЩҒЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШ§ШұЩғ ЩҒЩҠ Ш¬ЩҲШ§ШҰШІ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§ШіШӘЩҲШұЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩҶШіШӘЩӮШұШ§Щ… ШЁШҘШ°ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҮ

ШҘЩҶШіШӘЩӮШұШ§Щ…:рҹ‘Ү

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong вҖ“ Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
В 
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, вҖңGodzilla vs. Kong,вҖқ the next epic adventure in LegendaryвҖҷs cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in вҖңGodzilla vs. KongвҖқ as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titansвҖ”instigated by unseen forcesвҖ”is only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander SkarsgГҘrd (вҖңBig Little Lies,вҖқ вҖңThe Little Drummer GirlвҖқ), Millie Bobby Brown (вҖңStranger ThingsвҖқ), Rebecca Hall (вҖңChristine,вҖқ вҖңProfessor Marston and the Wonder WomenвҖқ), Brian Tyree Henry (вҖңJoker,вҖқ вҖңSpider-Man: Into the Spider-VerseвҖқ), Shun Oguri (вҖңWeathering with YouвҖқ), Eiza GonzГЎlez (вҖңFast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & ShawвҖқ), Julian Dennison (вҖңDeadpool 2вҖқ), with Kyle Chandler (вҖңGodzilla: King of the MonstersвҖқ) and DemiГЎn Bichir (вҖңThe Nun,вҖқ вҖңThe Hateful EightвҖқ).
Wingard (вҖңThe Guest,вҖқ вҖңYouвҖҷre NextвҖқ) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (вҖңThor: RagnarokвҖқ) and Max Borenstein (вҖңGodzilla: King of the Monsters,вҖқ вҖңKong: Skull IslandвҖқ), story by Terry Rossio (вҖңPirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No TalesвҖқ) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (вҖңGodzilla: King of the MonstersвҖқ), based on the character вҖңGodzillaвҖқ owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The directorвҖҷs behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (вҖңThe Mummy,вҖқ вҖңWorld War ZвҖқ), production designers Owen Paterson (вҖңJumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,вҖқ вҖңGodzillaвҖқ) and Thomas S. Hammock (вҖңBlair WitchвҖқ), editor Josh Schaeffer (вҖңGodzilla: King of the MonstersвҖқ), costume designer Ann Foley (вҖңSkyscraperвҖқ) and visual effects supervisor John вҖңDJвҖқ DesJardin (upcoming вҖңZack SnyderвҖҷs Justice LeagueвҖқ).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, вҖңGodzilla vs. Kong.вҖқ  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

localized.title: Godzilla vs. Kong вҖ“ Official Trailer
localized.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
В 
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, вҖңGodzilla vs. Kong,вҖқ the next epic adventure in LegendaryвҖҷs cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in вҖңGodzilla vs. KongвҖқ as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titansвҖ”instigated by unseen forcesвҖ”is only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander SkarsgГҘrd (вҖңBig Little Lies,вҖқ вҖңThe Little Drummer GirlвҖқ), Millie Bobby Brown (вҖңStranger ThingsвҖқ), Rebecca Hall (вҖңChristine,вҖқ вҖңProfessor Marston and the Wonder WomenвҖқ), Brian Tyree Henry (вҖңJoker,вҖқ вҖңSpider-Man: Into the Spider-VerseвҖқ), Shun Oguri (вҖңWeathering with YouвҖқ), Eiza GonzГЎlez (вҖңFast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & ShawвҖқ), Julian Dennison (вҖңDeadpool 2вҖқ), with Kyle Chandler (вҖңGodzilla: King of the MonstersвҖқ) and DemiГЎn Bichir (вҖңThe Nun,вҖқ вҖңThe Hateful EightвҖқ).
Wingard (вҖңThe Guest,вҖқ вҖңYouвҖҷre NextвҖқ) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (вҖңThor: RagnarokвҖқ) and Max Borenstein (вҖңGodzilla: King of the Monsters,вҖқ вҖңKong: Skull IslandвҖқ), story by Terry Rossio (вҖңPirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No TalesвҖқ) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (вҖңGodzilla: King of the MonstersвҖқ), based on the character вҖңGodzillaвҖқ owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The directorвҖҷs behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (вҖңThe Mummy,вҖқ вҖңWorld War ZвҖқ), production designers Owen Paterson (вҖңJumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,вҖқ вҖңGodzillaвҖқ) and Thomas S. Hammock (вҖңBlair WitchвҖқ), editor Josh Schaeffer (вҖңGodzilla: King of the MonstersвҖқ), costume designer Ann Foley (вҖңSkyscraperвҖқ) and visual effects supervisor John вҖңDJвҖқ DesJardin (upcoming вҖңZack SnyderвҖҷs Justice LeagueвҖқ).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, вҖңGodzilla vs. Kong.вҖқ  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.
